name: openspec
description: Spec-driven development tools — list, verify, and inspect OpenSpec artifacts

tool_definitions.name: spec_list
tool_definitions.description: List project specs with domains, purposes, and requirement counts

entries.description: Array of spec entries with domain and markdown content

content.description: Markdown content of the spec file

tool_definitions.name: spec_parse
tool_definitions.description: Parse a spec markdown file into structured requirements with GIVEN/WHEN/THEN scenarios

content.description: Markdown content of the spec file

tool_definitions.name: change_list
tool_definitions.description: List active OpenSpec changes with task progress summaries

entries.description: Array of change entries with name, metadata, and optional tasks content

tool_definitions.name: change_verify
tool_definitions.description: Verify an OpenSpec change — check task completion and spec coverage

has_specs_dir.description: Whether a specs/ directory exists for this change

tool_definitions.name: artifact_status
tool_definitions.description: Show artifact dependency graph state for an OpenSpec change

existing_files.description: List of files that already exist in the change directory
